description: Home energy monitoring: real-time power flow, period KPIs, cost analysis, solar & battery performance, circuit breakdown, and trend projections.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -5m)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "W" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_consumed_power" and r._field == "value")
    |> last()

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -5m)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "W" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_total_pv_power" and r._field == "value")
    |> last()

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -5m)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "%" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_plant_battery_soc" and r._field == "value")
    |> last()

panels.title: Batt Power

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -5m)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "W" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_plant_battery_power" and r._field == "value")
    |> last()
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * -1.0}))

panels.description: Positive = discharging (providing power), Negative = charging

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -5m)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "W" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_grid_sensor_import_power" and r._field == "value")
    |> last()

solar = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -5m)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "W" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_total_pv_power" and r._field == "value")
    |> last()
    |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

export = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -5m)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "W" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_grid_sensor_export_power" and r._field == "value")
    |> last()
    |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

branch = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -5m)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "W" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_consumed_power" and r._field == "value")
    |> last()
    |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

solarUsed = solar._value - export._value
rate = if branch._value > 0.0 then (solarUsed / branch._value) * 100.0 else 0.0

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -5m)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "W" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_consumed_power" and r._field == "value")
    |> last()
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: rate}))

import "date"
import "timezone"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Australia/Sydney")

hour = date.hour(t: now())
month = date.month(t: now())
isPeakSeason = month >= 11 or month <= 3 or (month >= 6 and month <= 8)
isEVTime = hour >= 0 and hour < 6
isSuperOffPeak = hour >= 11 and hour < 14
isPeakTime = hour >= 15 and hour < 21

// 0=EV Off-Peak, 1=Super Off-Peak, 2=Off-Peak, 3=Peak
tariffCode = if isEVTime then 0.0
else if isSuperOffPeak then 1.0
else if isPeakTime and isPeakSeason then 3.0
else 2.0

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: -1m)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "W" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_consumed_power" and r._field == "value")
    |> last()
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: tariffCode}))
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

panels.title: Net Cost
panels.description: Total electricity cost for the period (import + supply − feed-in credit)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_common_load_consumption" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> sum()

panels.description: Total energy consumed by the home

panels.title: Solar Generation
panels.description: Total solar energy generated

targets.query:
solarGen = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_third_party_pv_generation" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> sum()
    |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

solarExp = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_exported_energy" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> sum()
    |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

consumption = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_common_load_consumption" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> sum()
    |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

selfConsumed = solarGen._value - solarExp._value
rate = if consumption._value > 0.0 then (selfConsumed / consumption._value) * 100.0 else 0.0

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_common_load_consumption" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> sum()
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: rate}))

panels.description: Percentage of consumption met by solar (not from the grid)

targets.query:
import "date"
import "timezone"
import "dict"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Australia/Sydney")


peak_tariff = $${peak_tariff}
offpeak_tariff = $${offpeak_tariff}
evoffpeak_tariff = $${evoffpeak_tariff}
superoffpeak_tariff = $${superoffpeak_tariff}
feedin_tariff = $${feedin_tariff}
daily_supply_charge = $${daily_supply_charge}

dailySupplyCharge = daily_supply_charge
feedInTariff = feedin_tariff

tariffs = dict.fromList(pairs: [
    {key: "peak", value: peak_tariff},
    {key: "offpeak", value: offpeak_tariff},
    {key: "evoffpeak", value: evoffpeak_tariff},
    {key: "superoffpeak", value: superoffpeak_tariff}
])

getPrice = (timeVal) => {
    hour = date.hour(t: timeVal)
    month = date.month(t: timeVal)
    isPeakSeason = month >= 11 or month <= 3 or (month >= 6 and month <= 8)
    isEVTime = hour >= 0 and hour < 6
    isSuperOffPeak = hour >= 11 and hour < 14
    isPeakTime = hour >= 15 and hour < 21
    return if isEVTime then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "evoffpeak", default: 0.0)
    else if isSuperOffPeak then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "superoffpeak", default: 0.0)
    else if isPeakTime and isPeakSeason then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "peak", default: 0.0)
    else dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "offpeak", default: 0.0)
}

kwh = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_imported_energy" and r._field == "value")
    |> sum()
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({_measurement: "cost_per_kwh", _field: "total_kwh", _value: r._value}))

cost = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_imported_energy" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * getPrice(timeVal: r._time)}))
    |> sum()
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({_measurement: "cost_per_kwh", _field: "total_cost", _value: r._value}))

union(tables: [kwh, cost])
    |> pivot(rowKey: ["_measurement"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({_measurement: r._measurement, _field: "cost_per_kwh", _value: r.total_cost / r.total_kwh}))
    |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
    |> yield()

panels.title: Avg Cost/kWh
panels.description: Average effective cost per kWh of imported electricity

panels.title: Charged

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_charged_energy" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> sum()

panels.title: Battery Savings
panels.description: Money saved by discharging battery during expensive tariff periods

panels.title: Efficiency

targets.query:
charged = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_charged_energy" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> sum()
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _measurement: "batt", _field: "charged"}))

discharged = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_discharged_energy" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> sum()
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _measurement: "batt", _field: "discharged"}))

union(tables: [charged, discharged])
    |> pivot(rowKey: ["_measurement"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r.charged > 0.0 then r.discharged / r.charged else 0.0}))

panels.description: Round-trip efficiency (discharged ÷ charged)

panels.title: Cycles

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_discharged_energy" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> sum()
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / 16.7}))

panels.description: Equivalent full battery cycles (discharged ÷ capacity)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "W" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_total_pv_power" and r._field == "value")
    |> max()

    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)

panels.title: Peak Grid Import
panels.description: Maximum instantaneous grid import

targets.query:
import "date"
import "strings"

relativeTime = string(v: v.timeRangeStart)
shiftDuration = if strings.hasPrefix(v: relativeTime, prefix: "-") then
    strings.trimPrefix(v: relativeTime, prefix: "-")
else string(v: int(v: uint(v: v.timeRangeStop) - uint(v: v.timeRangeStart)) / 1000000000) + "s"

comparisonStart = date.sub(d: duration(v: shiftDuration), from: v.timeRangeStart)
comparisonStop = date.sub(d: duration(v: shiftDuration), from: v.timeRangeStop)

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: comparisonStart, stop: comparisonStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_common_load_consumption" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> sum()

    strings.trimPrefix(v: relativeTime, prefix: "-")

comparisonStart = date.sub(d: duration(v: shiftDuration), from: v.timeRangeStart)
comparisonStop = date.sub(d: duration(v: shiftDuration), from: v.timeRangeStop)

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: comparisonStart, stop: comparisonStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_third_party_pv_generation" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> sum()

comparisonStop = date.sub(d: duration(v: shiftDuration), from: v.timeRangeStop)

evoffpeak_tariff = $${evoffpeak_tariff}

    {key: "evoffpeak", value: evoffpeak_tariff},
    {key: "superoffpeak", value: superoffpeak_tariff}
])

getPrice = (timeVal) => {
    hour = date.hour(t: timeVal)
    month = date.month(t: timeVal)
    isPeakSeason = month >= 11 or month <= 3 or (month >= 6 and month <= 8)
    isEVTime = hour >= 0 and hour < 6
    isSuperOffPeak = hour >= 11 and hour < 14
    isPeakTime = hour >= 15 and hour < 21
    return if isEVTime then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "evoffpeak", default: 0.0)

}

relativeTime = string(v: v.timeRangeStart)
shiftDuration = if strings.hasPrefix(v: relativeTime, prefix: "-") then
    strings.trimPrefix(v: relativeTime, prefix: "-")
else string(v: int(v: uint(v: v.timeRangeStop) - uint(v: v.timeRangeStart)) / 1000000000) + "s"

comparisonStart = date.sub(d: duration(v: shiftDuration), from: v.timeRangeStart)
comparisonStop = date.sub(d: duration(v: shiftDuration), from: v.timeRangeStop)

data = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: comparisonStart, stop: comparisonStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r._field == "value" and (r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_imported_energy" or r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_exported_energy"))
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)

importCost = data
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_imported_energy")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * getPrice(timeVal: r._time)}))
    |> sum()

supplyCharge = data
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_imported_energy")
    |> limit(n: 1)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        _time: v.timeRangeStop,
        _value: if v.timeRangeStart >= date.truncate(t: v.timeRangeStop, unit: 1d) then dailySupplyCharge
        else dailySupplyCharge * float(v: (uint(v: date.truncate(t: v.timeRangeStop, unit: 1d)) - uint(v: date.truncate(t: v.timeRangeStart, unit: 1d)))) / float(v: uint(v: 1d))
    }))

feedInCredit = data
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_exported_energy")
    |> sum()
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * feedInTariff * -1.0}))
    |> sum()

union(tables: [importCost, supplyCharge, feedInCredit])
    |> group()
    |> sum()

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "W" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_total_pv_power" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Solar Generation"}))
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "W" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_grid_sensor_import_power" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Grid Import"}))
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "W" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_grid_sensor_export_power" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Grid Export"}))
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "W" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_consumed_power" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Consumption"}))
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "W" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_plant_battery_power" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * -1.0, _field: "Battery"}))
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "%" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_plant_battery_soc" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "W" and r._field == "value"
        and (r.entity_id == "sigen_0_battery_charging_power" or r.entity_id == "sigen_0_battery_discharging_power"))
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        r with
        _field: if r.entity_id == "sigen_0_battery_charging_power" then "Charging" else "Discharging",
        _value: if r.entity_id == "sigen_0_battery_discharging_power" then -r._value else r._value
    }))
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r._field == "value"
        and (r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_charged_energy" or r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_discharged_energy"))
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        r with
        _field: if r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_charged_energy" then "Charged" else "Discharged"
    }))
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])

import "date"
import "timezone"
import "dict"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Australia/Sydney")


peak_tariff = $${peak_tariff}
offpeak_tariff = $${offpeak_tariff}
evoffpeak_tariff = $${evoffpeak_tariff}
superoffpeak_tariff = $${superoffpeak_tariff}
feedin_tariff = $${feedin_tariff}
daily_supply_charge = $${daily_supply_charge}

tariffs = dict.fromList(pairs: [
    {key: "peak", value: peak_tariff},
    {key: "offpeak", value: offpeak_tariff},
    {key: "evoffpeak", value: evoffpeak_tariff},
    {key: "superoffpeak", value: superoffpeak_tariff}
])

getPrice = (timeVal) => {
    hour = date.hour(t: timeVal)
    month = date.month(t: timeVal)
    isPeakSeason = month >= 11 or month <= 3 or (month >= 6 and month <= 8)
    isEVTime = hour >= 0 and hour < 6
    isSuperOffPeak = hour >= 11 and hour < 14
    isPeakTime = hour >= 15 and hour < 21
    return if isEVTime then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "evoffpeak", default: 0.0)
    else if isSuperOffPeak then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "superoffpeak", default: 0.0)
    else if isPeakTime and isPeakSeason then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "peak", default: 0.0)
    else dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "offpeak", default: 0.0)
}

kwh = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_imported_energy" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: last, timeSrc: "_start", createEmpty: false)
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _measurement: "cost_per_kwh", _field: "total_kwh", _value: r._value}))

cost = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_imported_energy" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, timeSrc: "_start", createEmpty: false)
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * getPrice(timeVal: r._time)}))
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: last, timeSrc: "_start", createEmpty: false)
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _measurement: "cost_per_kwh", _field: "total_cost", _value: r._value}))

union(tables: [kwh, cost])
    |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "_measurement"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r.total_cost / r.total_kwh}))
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
    |> yield()

import "date"
import "timezone"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Australia/Sydney")

getTariffType = (timeVal) => {
    hour = date.hour(t: timeVal)
    month = date.month(t: timeVal)
    isPeakSeason = month >= 11 or month <= 3 or (month >= 6 and month <= 8)
    isEVTime = hour >= 0 and hour < 6
    isSuperOffPeak = hour >= 11 and hour < 14
    isPeakTime = hour >= 15 and hour < 21
    return if isEVTime then "evoffpeak"
    else if isSuperOffPeak then "superoffpeak"
    else if isPeakTime and isPeakSeason then "peak"
    else "offpeak"
}

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_imported_energy" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value, tariff: getTariffType(timeVal: r._time)}))
    |> group(columns: ["tariff"])
    |> sum()
    |> group()
    |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)

import "date"
import "timezone"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Australia/Sydney")

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_imported_energy" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "W" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_total_pv_power" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Solar Generation"}))
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_third_party_pv_generation" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: last, timeSrc: "_start", createEmpty: false)
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value}))
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

solarGen = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_third_party_pv_generation" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)

solarExp = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_exported_energy" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)

join(tables: {gen: solarGen, exp: solarExp}, on: ["_time"])
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        _time: r._time,
        _value: if r._value_gen > 0.0 then ((r._value_gen - r._value_exp) / r._value_gen) * 100.0 else 0.0,
        _field: "Self-Consumption %"
    }))
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

solarGen = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_third_party_pv_generation" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)

solarExp = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_exported_energy" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)

branch = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_common_load_consumption" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)

solarUsed = join(tables: {gen: solarGen, exp: solarExp}, on: ["_time"])
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value_gen - r._value_exp, _field: "solar_used"}))
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

join(tables: {solar: solarUsed, cons: branch}, on: ["_time"])
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        _time: r._time,
        _value: if r._value_cons > 0.0 then (r._value_solar / r._value_cons) * 100.0 else 0.0,
        _field: "Self-Sufficiency %"
    }))
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

grid_import = from(bucket: "iotawatt")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "GridImport" and r.unit == "Wh")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * $${cal_import}}))
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: sum, timeSrc: "_start", createEmpty: false)

solar_generation = from(bucket: "iotawatt")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "SolarGeneration" and r.unit == "Wh")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * $${cal_solar}}))
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: sum, timeSrc: "_start", createEmpty: false)

circuits = from(bucket: "iotawatt")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement !~ /(Grid|Branch|Solar)/ and r.unit == "Wh")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: sum, timeSrc: "_start", createEmpty: false)
    |> group(columns: ["_field"], mode: "by")
    |> drop(columns: ["_field", "_start", "_stop", "ct", "device", "unit"])
    |> group()

total_consumption = join(tables: {grid_import: grid_import, solar_generation: solar_generation}, on: ["_time"])
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value_grid_import", "_value_solar_generation"])

join(tables: {circuits: circuits, total_consumption: total_consumption}, on: ["_time"])
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: ((r._value / (r._value_grid_import + r._value_solar_generation)) * r._value_grid_import) / 1000.0}))
    |> drop(columns: ["_value_total_consumption", "_value_grid_import"])
    |> group(columns: ["_measurement"], mode: "by")
    |> sum()
    |> group()
    |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
    |> yield(name: "usage")

])

    isEVTime = hour >= 0 and hour < 6
    isSuperOffPeak = hour >= 11 and hour < 14

    return if isEVTime then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "evoffpeak", default: 0.0)

    else dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "offpeak", default: 0.0)
}

grid_import = from(bucket: "iotawatt")

    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * $${cal_import}}))

solar_generation = from(bucket: "iotawatt")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "SolarGeneration" and r.unit == "Wh")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * $${cal_solar}}))
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: sum, timeSrc: "_start", createEmpty: false)

join(tables: {circuits: circuits, total_consumption: total_consumption}, on: ["_time"])

    |> drop(columns: ["_value_total_consumption", "_value_grid_import"])

getPrice = (timeVal) => {

    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "SolarGeneration" and r.unit == "Wh")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * $${cal_solar}}))

    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_imported_energy" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1mo, fn: last, timeSrc: "_start", createEmpty: false)
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, _field: "Import"}))
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

import "date"
import "timezone"
import "dict"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Australia/Sydney")


peak_tariff = $${peak_tariff}
offpeak_tariff = $${offpeak_tariff}
evoffpeak_tariff = $${evoffpeak_tariff}
superoffpeak_tariff = $${superoffpeak_tariff}
feedin_tariff = $${feedin_tariff}
daily_supply_charge = $${daily_supply_charge}

dailySupplyCharge = daily_supply_charge
feedInTariff = feedin_tariff

tariffs = dict.fromList(pairs: [
    {key: "peak", value: peak_tariff},
    {key: "offpeak", value: offpeak_tariff},
    {key: "evoffpeak", value: evoffpeak_tariff},
    {key: "superoffpeak", value: superoffpeak_tariff}
])

getPrice = (timeVal) => {
    hour = date.hour(t: timeVal)
    month = date.month(t: timeVal)
    isPeakSeason = month >= 11 or month <= 3 or (month >= 6 and month <= 8)
    isEVTime = hour >= 0 and hour < 6
    isSuperOffPeak = hour >= 11 and hour < 14
    isPeakTime = hour >= 15 and hour < 21
    return if isEVTime then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "evoffpeak", default: 0.0)
    else if isSuperOffPeak then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "superoffpeak", default: 0.0)
    else if isPeakTime and isPeakSeason then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "peak", default: 0.0)
    else dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "offpeak", default: 0.0)
}

rangeDays = float(v: uint(v: v.timeRangeStop) - uint(v: v.timeRangeStart)) / float(v: uint(v: 1d))

data = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r._field == "value" and (r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_imported_energy" or r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_exported_energy"))
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)

importCost = data
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_imported_energy")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * getPrice(timeVal: r._time)}))
    |> sum()

feedInCredit = data
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_exported_energy")
    |> sum()
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * feedInTariff * -1.0}))
    |> sum()

union(tables: [importCost, feedInCredit])
    |> group()
    |> sum()
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: ((r._value + (dailySupplyCharge * rangeDays)) / rangeDays) * 30.44}))

panels.description: Based on the last 30 days average daily cost, projected to a full month (30.44 days)

panels.title: Projected Annual Solar Savings

targets.query:
rangeDays = float(v: uint(v: v.timeRangeStop) - uint(v: v.timeRangeStart)) / float(v: uint(v: 1d))

from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kWh" and r.entity_id == "sigen_0_si_total_common_load_consumption" and r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> difference(nonNegative: true)
    |> sum()
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: (r._value / rangeDays) }))
